{{cancelled Video|linked_video=Undetermined, likely [[A Systems-Oriented Theory of Everything]]}}
[[Category:Planned Videos]]
[[sn:Is high school unethical?]][[sn:Is high school unethical?]][[Category:Domicide]]
[[sn:Is high school unethical?]]Is high school unethical is a planned video on whether high school is unethical or not

It focuses on the idea that high school offers a more kind social environment that makes people train the wrong skills and get the wrong idea of social success, resulting in them being unable to have social success in adulthood.

==Hostility of high school==
Some people consider high school a hostile environment, but I'd argue it is not the case except for in one critical area: age segregation

Age segregation makes it so that people are in an explosive environment of immaturity and hormones. The fact that you cannot go back and master this environment makes it so that trauma lingers more than it would otherwise. The environment is one any adult would master, but children are still bad.

== [[Great November Outage]] ==
{{cancelled Video}}

High school has an artificial social environment and makes everything a race https://www.youtube.com/shorts/BpLDg9gs0Qw

Falling behind has consequences which are artificial and limit people
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
